description.zh-Hans: 使用阈值分形噪波和双频细节生成云/天空图案。支持多种云类型（积云、层云、卷云）和渐变过渡。
description.en: Generates cloud/sky patterns using thresholded fractal noise with dual-band detail. Supports multiple cloud types (cumulus, stratus, cirrus) and gradient ramps.

triggers.zh-Hans: 云朵, 云彩, 天空, 积云, 层云, 卷云
triggers.en: cloud, sky, atmosphere, cumulus, stratus, cirrus

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成带有积云或层云的天空背景纹理，适合游戏场景的远景贴图。
exampleUsage.en: Generates a sky background with cumulus or stratus clouds for game scene backgrounds.
